response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in high-throughput systems, testing frameworks, and recent AI tooling, his resume lacks the core domain expertise required for this Principal role. There is no evidence of building or architecting experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or telemetry infrastructure, which are central requirements for an IC6 Growth and Experimentation position.
strengths: Extensive engineering experience (15+ years) across diverse stacks (C++, Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) and high-scale microservices.
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring through organizing workshops, creating testing libraries, and founding an open-source platform.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling aligns with the AI-first focus of the role.
concerns: Complete lack of demonstrated experience in building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems.
No evidence of advanced data aptitude related to experimental analysis, statistical methods, or telemetry foundations.
Missing experience in growth engineering, rollout automation, and cross-surface funnel optimization.
